name: @agentmemory/agentmemory
description: Persistent memory for AI coding agents, powered by iii-engine's three primitives

scripts.build: tsdown && (cp iii-config.yaml dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp iii-config.docker.yaml dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp docker-compose.yml dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && mkdir -p dist/viewer && cp src/viewer/index.html dist/viewer/
scripts.agentmemory:restart: for pattern in '^node dist/cli\.mjs --verbose$' '^node dist/index\.mjs$' '^/home/ericjuta/.local/bin/iii --config .*/agentmemory/dist/iii-config\.yaml$'; do for pid in $(pgrep -f "$pattern" 2>/dev/null); do kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true; done; done; if [ -f /tmp/agentmemory-cli.pid ]; then kill $(cat /tmp/agentmemory-cli.pid) 2>/dev/null || true; fi; sleep 2; for pattern in '^node dist/cli\.mjs --verbose$' '^node dist/index\.mjs$' '^/home/ericjuta/.local/bin/iii --config .*/agentmemory/dist/iii-config\.yaml$'; do for pid in $(pgrep -f "$pattern" 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 $pid 2>/dev/null || true; done; done; : > /tmp/agentmemory-cli.log; rm -f /tmp/agentmemory-cli.pid; nohup sh -c 'set -a; . $HOME/.agentmemory/.env; set +a; node dist/cli.mjs --verbose' > /tmp/agentmemory-cli.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /tmp/agentmemory-cli.pid
scripts.agentmemory:status: ps -ef | rg -n 'node dist/cli\.mjs|node dist/index\.mjs|iii --config .*/agentmemory/dist/iii-config\.yaml' | rg -v rg || true; ss -ltnp | rg '3111|3112|3113|49134' || true; curl -fsS --max-time 5 http://127.0.0.1:3111/agentmemory/livez || true
scripts.agentmemory:verify: rg -n '^(GEMINI_API_KEY|EMBEDDING_PROVIDER|GEMINI_EMBEDDING_MODEL|GEMINI_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS|GRAPH_EXTRACTION_ENABLED|CONSOLIDATION_ENABLED|AGENTMEMORY_AUTO_COMPRESS|AGENTMEMORY_INJECT_CONTEXT)=' ~/.agentmemory/.env | sed -E 's/(API_KEY|SECRET|TOKEN|PASSWORD)=.*/\1=[redacted]/'; rg -n 'Provider:|Embedding provider:|Knowledge graph: extraction enabled|Consolidation pipeline|WARNING: AGENTMEMORY_AUTO_COMPRESS|WARNING: AGENTMEMORY_INJECT_CONTEXT' /tmp/agentmemory-cli.log
scripts.agentmemory:check-api-local: for p in /agentmemory/livez /agentmemory/health /agentmemory/sessions /agentmemory/actions /agentmemory/frontier /agentmemory/next; do echo "## $p"; curl -siS --max-time 4 http://127.0.0.1:3111$p | sed -n '1,8p'; done
scripts.agentmemory:check-api-tailnet: HOST="${AGENTMEMORY_TAILNET_HOST:-https://eric-claw.tail497567.ts.net:3111}"; for p in /agentmemory/livez /agentmemory/health /agentmemory/sessions /agentmemory/actions /agentmemory/frontier /agentmemory/next; do echo "## $p"; curl -skiS --max-time 6 "${HOST}$p" | sed -n '1,8p'; done
scripts.eval:codex-session:ci:fast: npm test -- test/codex-session-eval.test.ts && npm run eval:codex-session

author: Rohit Ghumare <ghumare64@gmail.com>
